havesta_content_hero.badge: Seed Round Open · AgriTech Infrastructure · Nigeria & Africa
havesta_content_hero.subheadline: Havesta is a technology-enabled food distribution platform connecting farmers to businesses and consumers through cold-chain logistics, smart warehousing, and digital marketplace infrastructure.

havesta_content_problem.subheadline: Nigeria and Africa are sitting on the world's largest agricultural opportunity — yet food wastage, broken logistics, and absent cold-chain infrastructure are costing the continent billions every year.
havesta_content_problem.bannerDesc: lost in food wastage across Nigeria every single year

cards.title: Post-Harvest Loss
cards.desc: Nearly 40% of all harvested food in Nigeria is lost before reaching consumers — a $9 billion annual crisis.

cards.title: Cold-Chain Penetration
cards.desc: Only 6% of Nigeria's food supply chain is cold-chain enabled, leaving perishables vulnerable at every touchpoint.

cards.title: Middlemen Layers
cards.desc: Farmers receive as little as 20% of final retail price due to deeply fragmented and exploitative distribution chains.

cards.title: Price Inflation
cards.desc: Food inflation exceeds 35% annually in Nigeria — driven entirely by supply chain inefficiency, not supply scarcity.

cards.title: Annual Wastage Cost
cards.desc: Nigeria loses over $9 billion in food value annually — one of the highest food wastage rates on the continent.

cards.title: Underserved Farmers
cards.desc: Over 200 million smallholder farmers across Africa have no reliable market access, price visibility, or logistics support.

havesta_content_solution.subheadline: Havesta integrates cold-chain logistics, digital commerce, and supply chain technology into a single operating system for food distribution across Africa.

pillars.title: Cold-Chain Logistics
pillars.desc: Refrigerated transportation and last-mile delivery across Nigeria's key agricultural corridors, maintaining product integrity from farm gate to consumer.

pillars.title: Smart Warehousing
pillars.desc: Temperature-controlled storage facilities with IoT monitoring, inventory management, and real-time reporting for B2B clients and marketplaces.

pillars.title: Digital Marketplace
pillars.desc: A dual-sided B2B and B2C marketplace connecting farmers, wholesalers, retailers, and consumers — with transparent pricing and quality guarantees.

pillars.title: Supply Chain Intelligence
pillars.desc: Data-driven demand forecasting, route optimization, and supply-demand matching tools that reduce waste and improve margins across the network.

pillars.title: Last-Mile Delivery
pillars.desc: Hyper-local fulfillment networks for B2C grocery delivery and B2B food supply — with same-day and scheduled delivery windows across urban hubs.

pillars.title: IoT Monitoring
pillars.desc: Real-time temperature, humidity, and geolocation sensors embedded throughout the cold-chain ensuring product quality at every step.

havesta_content_howItWorks.subheadline: A seamless, technology-orchestrated flow that eliminates waste and inefficiency at every step.
havesta_content_howItWorks.summaryText: Havesta acts as the operating layer between agricultural supply and food demand — combining physical cold-chain infrastructure with a software-driven marketplace to create Africa's most efficient food distribution network.

steps.title: Farmer Onboarding
steps.desc: Farmers register on the Havesta platform via mobile or agent-assisted onboarding, list their produce, set pricing, and connect to our fulfilment network.

steps.title: Havesta Infrastructure
steps.desc: Our logistics engine coordinates cold-chain pickup, warehousing, quality grading, smart packaging, and inventory management across regional hubs.

steps.title: B2B Order Fulfilment
steps.desc: Restaurants, supermarkets, hotels, and FMCG brands place bulk orders via our B2B portal. Havesta fulfils via temperature-controlled fleet delivery.

steps.title: B2C Consumer Delivery
steps.desc: Urban households and individuals order fresh groceries via the Havesta app and receive same-day or next-day delivery from verified cold-chain stock.

havesta_content_market.subheadline: Africa's food market is one of the world's fastest-growing. Havesta is entering at the inflection point — where digital infrastructure meets physical supply chain.

markets.label: TAM
markets.desc: Africa's total food market by 2030, driven by population growth, urbanization, and rising middle-class consumption.

markets.label: SAM
markets.desc: Nigeria's food retail and distribution market — one of Africa's largest, with ~220M consumers and $50B+ grocery spend annually.

markets.label: SOM
markets.desc: Target cold-chain and digital food distribution segment across Lagos, Abuja, and Kano — Havesta's initial operational zones.

tailwinds.label: Nigeria GDP growth driven by agriculture

havesta_content_businessModel.subheadline: Havesta captures value across the supply chain — from logistics to storage to marketplace commerce — creating a resilient, multi-revenue infrastructure business.

streams.title: Delivery Revenue
streams.desc: Revenue generated from B2B and B2C delivery of perishables and grocery items via our cold-chain fleet.

streams.title: Storage & Warehousing
streams.desc: Recurring revenue from cold-storage rental contracts with FMCG brands, food processors, and agricultural cooperatives.

streams.title: Marketplace Commission
streams.desc: Commission earned on every transaction facilitated through the Havesta B2B procurement and B2C grocery marketplace.

streams.title: B2B Contracts
streams.desc: Long-term supply agreements with hotels, hospitals, restaurant chains, and institutional food buyers requiring guaranteed supply.

streams.title: Subscription Tiers
streams.desc: Premium membership tiers for both B2B buyers (priority supply, analytics dashboards) and B2C consumers (free delivery, discounts).

havesta_content_competitive.subheadline: No competitor has integrated cold-chain, technology, and dual-sided commerce into one platform. Havesta's infrastructure creates deep switching costs and compounding network effects.

moats.title: Cold-Chain Scarcity
moats.desc: Physical infrastructure is expensive to replicate — creating high barriers to entry for digital-only competitors.

moats.title: Network Effects
moats.desc: More farmers attract more buyers; more buyers attract more farmers — creating compounding value with scale.

moats.title: Data Intelligence
moats.desc: Every transaction and delivery builds proprietary data for demand forecasting, route optimization, and supply prediction.

havesta_content_technology.subheadline: Havesta is a technology company that operates physical infrastructure — not a logistics company that uses software. The distinction defines our scalability and margin profile.

pillars.title: Real-Time Logistics Engine
pillars.desc: AI-powered route optimization and dynamic dispatch system that coordinates fleet movements, reduces transit time by 40%, and ensures on-time cold-chain delivery.

pillars.title: IoT Cold-Chain Monitoring
pillars.desc: Hardware sensors embedded throughout storage facilities and delivery vehicles continuously monitor temperature, humidity, and product integrity in real-time.

pillars.title: Geospatial Intelligence
pillars.desc: Proprietary mapping and geo-data layer that identifies demand clusters, optimizes warehouse positioning, and predicts last-mile delivery windows at street level.

pillars.title: Supply Chain Data Platform
pillars.desc: Centralized data warehouse collecting SKU-level inventory, pricing, delivery, and farmer data — enabling actionable intelligence across the entire supply chain.

pillars.title: Demand Forecasting
pillars.desc: Machine learning models trained on historical order data, seasonal patterns, and market signals to predict demand and reduce food waste through proactive supply planning.

pillars.title: Vendor & Farmer OS
pillars.desc: Mobile-first dashboard for farmers and vendors to manage inventory, track payments, view demand forecasts, and receive smart logistics alerts — accessible on USSD and app.

havesta_content_traction.subheadline: Havesta is at pre-seed stage — platform built, first pilots underway, and a clear path from $50K validation round through seed to Series A and continental scale.

milestones.title: Concept & Validation
milestones.desc: Business model validated, founding team formed, initial farmer and B2B interviews completed in Lagos.

milestones.title: MVP Development
milestones.desc: Core marketplace and logistics platform MVP built. First pilot conversations with Lagos restaurants and food retailers.

milestones.title: Pre-Seed Close ($50K)
milestones.desc: Close $50,000 pre-seed. Deploy cold-chain pilot unit, onboard first 20 farmers, sign 5 B2B clients.

milestones.title: Lagos Pilot Launch
milestones.desc: Live operations in Lagos — cold-chain delivery, marketplace transactions, and B2B supply contracts activated.

milestones.title: Seed Round ($500K)
milestones.desc: Raise seed round on proven unit economics. Expand to Abuja, grow farmer network to 500+, 50+ B2B clients.

milestones.title: Series A & Pan-Africa
milestones.desc: Raise Series A. Expand into Ghana, Kenya, and additional Nigerian cities with proven cold-chain model.

havesta_content_team.subheadline: Our team combines deep African logistics and operations expertise with world-class technology experience — built to execute, not just pitch.

members.name: Adewale Okonkwo
members.bio: Former operations lead at a Pan-African logistics firm. 8+ years in supply chain and food distribution across West Africa. MBA, Lagos Business School.

members.name: Chidinma Eze
members.bio: Ex-Senior Engineer at Flutterwave. Built marketplace and payments infrastructure at scale. MSc Computer Science, UCL. Full-stack and systems architecture.

members.name: Emeka Nwosu
members.bio: Built merchant networks for two leading Nigerian fintech startups. Specialist in B2B sales, partnership development, and market expansion across Nigeria.

members.name: Amara Osei
members.bio: Brand strategist with experience across Jumia, Andela, and Pan-African FMCG brands. Builds category-defining go-to-market strategies for tech startups.

havesta_content_investment.subheadline: Havesta is raising a $50,000 pre-seed round to validate cold-chain logistics, complete the MVP platform, and onboard the first batch of farmers and B2B clients in Lagos.

useOfFunds.label: Cold-Chain Pilot Infrastructure
useOfFunds.desc: Initial fleet deposit, cold-storage pilot unit, IoT sensors ($20,000)

useOfFunds.label: Technology & Product
useOfFunds.desc: Platform development, MVP completion, mobile apps ($12,500)

useOfFunds.label: Team & Operations
useOfFunds.desc: Key early hires, operations setup, contractor costs ($10,000)

useOfFunds.label: Sales & Market Testing
useOfFunds.desc: B2B outreach, farmer onboarding, early marketing ($7,500)

havesta_content_investment.formNote: We respond within 24 hours. No spam, ever.

havesta_content_executiveSummary.subheadline: A structured overview of our business, market, model, and opportunity for investors evaluating Havesta's seed round.

havesta_content_safeAgreement.subheadline: Our standard Simple Agreement for Future Equity — modelled on the Y Combinator SAFE framework, adapted for Nigerian law. Investors may execute a customised version at their preferred terms.

havesta_content_finalCTA.subheadline: Havesta is not building another food delivery app. We are building the cold-chain backbone that will move Africa's agricultural economy from fragmented and wasteful to integrated and intelligent.
